title: Towards whole-body fluorescence imaging in humans.
author: Piper SK Habermehl C Schmitz CH Kuebler WM Obrig H Steinbrink J Mehnert J
content: S-EPMC3877082 PMC3877082 Towards whole-body fluorescence imaging in humans. Dynamic near-infrared fluorescence (DNIF) whole-body imaging of small animals has become a popular tool in experimental biomedical research. In humans, however, the field of view has been limited to body parts
